competitors.name: Cursor
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Cursor AI editor new features changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Cursor 3 (April 2026): unified workspace for building software with agents, Background Agents, Cloud Agents, Composer 2.0. /multitask for async subagents to parallelize requests instead of queuing. Await tool lets agents wait for background shell commands and subagents to complete, or wait for specific output like 'Ready' or 'Error'. Cursor 3.3 (May 6, 2026): breakdown of agent's context usage visible to users. Composer 2.5: smarter model for long-running tasks, improved collaboration, faster tier with double usage for first week. Dockerfile configuration: Cursor can configure Dockerfile by inspecting repos and figuring out tools/dependencies. Development environments now have own version history for rollback.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Cursor 3 (April 2026): unified workspace for building software with agents, Background Agents, Cloud Agents, Composer 2.0. /multitask for async

changes.description: Cursor 3 推出 Background Agents + Cloud Agents：AI agent 在后台自主运行，用户可离开并行等待
changes.evidence: 「Background Agents, Cloud Agents, and a dramatically improved Composer 2.0 introduced in early 2026」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI agent 作为独立的后台 session 运行，与人的 session 并行——这是 meee2 人=慢session/AI=快session 同协议模型的直接竞争实现

changes.description: /multitask 命令：在编辑器内运行异步子 agent 并行化任务，而非放入队列
changes.evidence: 「/multitask is now available in the editor for running async subagents to parallelize your requests instead of adding them to the queue」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多个 AI 快 session 并行处理不同任务的协议实现，与 meee2 的 session 同构模型高度重叠

changes.description: Await tool：agent 可等待后台 shell 命令或子 agent 完成、或等待特定输出（'Ready'/'Error'），形成 agent 间协调协议
changes.evidence: 「Await tool lets agents wait for background shell commands and subagents to complete, or wait for specific output such as 'Ready' or 'Error'」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：agent 之间有显式等待/协调原语，接近 meee2 的 session 间通信协议概念

key_findings: Cursor 3 (April 2026)：Background Agents + Cloud Agents 标志着 Cursor 从 IDE 辅助转向多 agent 并发执行平台
/multitask + Await tool 构建了完整的 agent-to-agent 协调原语，覆盖 meee2 的 AI 快 session 并行架构
Cursor 3.3 (May 6, 2026)：agent context 用量可视化，向用户暴露 session 级别资源管理

competitors.name: Claude.ai
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new features projects artifacts agent 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Live Artifacts (April 2026): dashboards/trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, staying connected to data sources for KPI monitoring and pipeline tracking. Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly—build intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside artifact. Three features retiring by June 15: legacy Artifacts, custom Styles, Project file upload search → replaced by VM-based equivalents. MCP as of March 2026 connects 6,000+ apps. Claude Code GA (2025-05-22). Claude Opus 4.6 (Feb 5, 2026) + Sonnet 4.6 (Feb 17): 1M token context. Cowork feature. Platform: Projects, Artifacts, Memory, Cowork, Claude Code, Computer Use, Skills, MCP, Extended Thinking.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Live Artifacts (April 2026): dashboards/trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, staying connected to data sources for KPI monitor

changes.description: Live Artifacts（April 2026）：artifact 实时连接数据源，每次打开自动刷新，非静态快照
changes.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, staying connected to data sources for KPI monitoring and pipeline tracking」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：跨工具 artifact live link（非 snapshot）——Claude.ai 正在构建与 meee2 核心差异化锚点完全一致的功能

changes.description: Artifact 迁移至 VM-based 执行（June 15 deadline）：从静态渲染转向真实计算环境，artifact 可直接调用 Claude API
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts ships on all paid plans and inside Projects. Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly, which means you can build intelligent micro-applications where the AI runs inside the artifact itself」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：artifact 从展示层演化为有计算能力的 live 实体，进一步实现 live link 而非 snapshot 的架构

key_findings: Live Artifacts 直接实现了 meee2 差异化锚点 #2（cross-tool artifact live link）：artifact 连接实时数据源、刷新而非存储静态快照
VM-based 执行迁移（June 15）：artifact 获得真实计算能力，Claude API 可在 artifact 内部运行，彻底改变 artifact 的架构性质

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
fetched_urls: WebSearch: GitHub Copilot new features agent workspace autonomous 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Agent Mode GA (March 2026): autonomous multi-step coding agent in VS Code + JetBrains, determines files to edit, runs terminal commands, iterates on errors without manual intervention. Copilot Workspace: task-scoped, one workspace per issue/feature, pairs spec+plan+implementation in collaborative surface—humans and agent edit the same plan, agent runs implementation, reviewers comment inline. Coding Agent: assign GitHub issue to Copilot, it works autonomously in background—writes code, runs tests, opens PR. Agentic Code Review: gathers full project context, passes suggestions directly to coding agent to generate fix PRs automatically. GitHub Spark: Pro+ and Enterprise, describe app in plain English, generated code with live preview.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Agent Mode GA (March 2026): autonomous multi-step coding agent in VS Code + JetBrains, determines files to edit, runs terminal commands, iterates on errors

changes.description: Copilot Workspace 正式产品化：人与 agent 在同一规划平面编辑同一个 spec/plan/implementation
changes.evidence: 「task-scoped — one workspace per issue or feature — pairs a spec, a plan, and an implementation in a single collaborative surface, where humans and the agent edit the same plan, the agent runs the implementation, and reviewers comment in line」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：人和 agent 在同一协议面上协同（人=reviewer/editor，AI=executor），这是对 meee2 session 同构模型的直接竞争实现

changes.description: GitHub Spark：自然语言描述 → 有 live preview 的工作原型，覆盖 no-code 创建层
changes.evidence: 「Pro+ and Enterprise users can describe an application in plain English and get generated code with a live preview, bridging the gap between idea and working prototype」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：Descriptive-first（描述触发构建）的实现，与 meee2 的 descriptive canvas 概念有结构性重叠

key_findings: Copilot Workspace 产品化：人+agent 共同编辑同一 spec/plan/implementation，是最接近 meee2 session 同构模型的竞品实现
GitHub Spark：自然语言 → 有 live preview 的可工作原型，触碰 descriptive-first 锚点
Agent Mode GA（March 2026）：VS Code + JetBrains 中 autonomous 多步编码 agent 正式可用

competitors.name: Linear
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Linear app changelog new features AI automation 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Linear Agent public beta (March 26, 2026): works in online/mobile/desktop app, and as plugin for Slack/Teams/Zendesk. CEO declares 'Issue tracking is dead'. Skills: when a conversation gets good results, save as reusable skill—useful for recurring workflows like catching up on projects or drafting issues from meeting notes. Trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage. Code Intelligence (May 14, 2026): extends Linear Agent understanding to codebase—diagnose app functionality, design technical specifications. AI Coding Integration: launch preferred coding tool directly from Linear issue with prefilled prompt including issue ID, description, comments, updates, linked references, images. Auto-create Slack channels when new project created (May 2026), project members auto-added.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Linear Agent public beta (March 26, 2026): works in online/mobile/desktop app, and as plugin for Slack/Teams/Zendesk. CEO declares 'Issue tracking is dead'

changes.description: Linear Agent（March 2026）：跨 Slack/Teams/Zendesk 的 ambient AI coordinator，配有 Skills 可复用工作流
changes.evidence: 「The Linear Agent works in the online, mobile, or desktop app, and as a plug-in for products including Slack, Teams, and Zendesk」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull——Linear Agent 作为跨平台 ambient coordinator，在 Slack/Teams 等工具中拉取/推送 Linear 上下文

changes.description: CEO 宣告「Issue tracking is dead」：Linear 从 issue tracker 重新定位为 AI-first ambient workspace
changes.evidence: 「Linear adopts agentic AI as CEO declares issue tracking dead」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：从工具到 session-aware workspace 的定位跃迁，与 meee2 的 ambient workspace 竞争方向一致

changes.description: Code Intelligence（May 14, 2026）：Linear Agent 延伸至代码库理解，可诊断功能、设计技术规格
changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence is a capability that extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase, supporting code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications」

key_findings: Linear Agent（March 2026）：Slack/Teams/Zendesk plugin 形态的 ambient coordinator，宣告从 issue tracker 转型为 AI-first workspace
Skills 功能：把对话结果保存为可复用工作流，形成 workspace 级别的 session 记忆层
Code Intelligence（May 14, 2026）：agent 理解延伸至代码库，打通 PM 工具与代码执行层

competitors.name: Notion AI
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Notion AI new features agent automation connector 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Notion Developer Platform (May 13, 2026 - Notion 3.5): orchestration layer coordinating AI work across multiple tools and data sources. External Agents API: bring external agents into Notion including self-built agents; partner integrations with Claude, Codex, Decagon. Notion Workers: hosted runtime for custom code deployed via CLI, runs in secure sandbox; will run on Notion credits from August 11 2026. MCP connectors: Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, Sentry. Custom Agents in private Slack channels via Settings→Notion AI→AI connectors. Admin controls: who can create Custom Agents, how much each agent can spend. TechCrunch: 'Notion positioning itself as more than a note-taker and instead as a hub where people and agents can collaborate across tools and databases.'
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Notion Developer Platform (May 13, 2026 - Notion 3.5): orchestration layer coordinating AI work across multiple tools and data sources. External Agents API

changes.description: Notion 3.5（May 13, 2026）：从笔记工具转型为多 agent 协作 hub，构建跨工具 AI orchestration 层
changes.evidence: 「Notion is positioning itself as more than a note-taker with AI features and instead as a hub where people and agents can collaborate across tools and databases」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull——Notion 正在构建跨工具 AI 协调层，但以 Notion 为中心 hub 而非 protocol

changes.description: External Agents API：允许外部 agent 进入 Notion，Claude/Codex 开箱可用
changes.evidence: 「You can bring your favorite agents into Notion with the External Agents API, even the ones you built yourself. Notion has also partnered with Claude, Codex, Decagon, and more so they work out of the box」

key_findings: Notion 3.5 开发者平台（May 13）：External Agents API + MCP connectors + Notion Workers 三合一，Notion 正式转型为 AI agent hub
Custom Agents 现可在私有 Slack 频道中回复，跨越 Notion 应用边界进入 comms 层

competitors.name: Slack
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Slack new AI features agent canvas automation 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Generate AI Response step in workflow builder (April 21-30 rollout): write prompt, point at knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), let LLM respond—available on Business+ v2 and Enterprise+. Slackbot autonomously acts: send DMs, create channels, invite teammates, create workflows on users' behalf. AI-Skills: define specific jobs once, Slackbot automatically offers to run when it recognizes the pattern. Canvas with AI writing assistance: summarize key points, extract action items, generate first drafts from conversations. Developer tools: slack create agent command, Bolt framework with bring-your-own-LLM. Slackbot multi-agent coordination: pings multiple agents simultaneously, auto-drafts account strategy canvas when asked for expansion plan.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Generate AI Response step in workflow builder (April 21-30 rollout): write prompt, point at knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), let LLM respond

changes.description: AI-Skills：Slackbot 识别用户意图后自动 offer 预设技能，向 ambient 操作模式演进
changes.evidence: 「AI-Skills allows teams to define specific jobs once like 'summarize this campaign brief,' and Slackbot will automatically offer to run the skill when it recognizes you're trying to do that task」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Peripheral 层主动介入——Slackbot 开始具备「感知→自动建议」能力，向菜单栏式 ambient agent 方向延伸

changes.description: Slackbot 自主行动：代用户发 DM、创建频道、邀请成员、创建工作流
changes.evidence: 「Slackbot can now act inside Slack by sending DMs, creating channels, inviting teammates, and creating workflows on users' behalf」

key_findings: Slackbot 从回答问题转向自主行动（发 DM、建频道、邀请成员），AI 在 comms 层的 agency 大幅提升
AI-Skills：Slackbot 开始识别用户意图并主动 offer 技能，初步具备 ambient awareness

competitors.name: Reflect
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Reflect notes app new features AI sync 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。MCP server: allows AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to search, read, edit and write to Reflect notes directly from terminal or chat interface. AI model choice: GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet. End-to-end encrypted assets (images/files, only decryptable by owner). SQLite rewrite brought to iPad app for performance. Cross-platform sync: iOS, offline capabilities. Voice transcription for hands-free note-taking. AI-powered chat with notes.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。MCP server: allows AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to search, read, edit and write to Reflect notes directly from terminal or cha

key_findings: MCP server 让 Reflect 笔记成为 AI coding 工具的上下文来源，从独立笔记工具转向 AI 工具链中的 context provider

competitors.name: Raycast
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Raycast new features AI agent changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Raycast 2.0 public beta: macOS + Windows support, Liquid Glass UI, AI voice dictation across apps, files/folders/contacts in Root Search, faster indexing, expanded AI features. Presets renamed to Agents (reused across chats, config change applies everywhere). Memory: automatic summary built from conversations over time, picks up projects/preferences/goals. Skills: custom instructions and knowledge for frequent tasks, loaded dynamically when relevant. Profile: user context (role, preferred tools, communication style) persisted across conversations. MCP HTTP Servers: SSE and Streamable protocols. GitHub Copilot agent integration: assign issues to Copilot from Raycast, monitor Copilot agent logs live in Raycast. AI Extensions for Ollama local models.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Raycast 2.0 public beta: macOS + Windows support, Liquid Glass UI, AI voice dictation across apps, files/folders/contacts in Root Search, faster indexing,

changes.description: Raycast 2.0：AI voice dictation across apps + Memory（跨对话持久上下文）+ 重命名 Agents，peripheral 层向 ambient agent 控制台演进
changes.evidence: 「Raycast 2.0 public beta is out, bringing AI voice dictation across apps... Added Memory, an automatic summary Raycast AI builds from your conversations over time, picking up on your projects, preferences, and goals」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Peripheral 层（菜单栏/launcher），现在具备跨 session 的持久记忆（Memory）和跨应用语音输入，向 meee2 的 5-字戳任意 session 的 peripheral 定位靠拢

changes.description: Raycast 集成 GitHub Copilot agent：可从 Raycast 分配 issue 给 Copilot agent，并实时监控 agent 日志
changes.evidence: 「Assign issues to Copilot coding agent from Raycast」「Monitor Copilot coding agent logs live in Raycast」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Raycast 作为 agent session 的 peripheral 控制台，监控 AI session 状态而不切换焦点

key_findings: Raycast 2.0：从单机 launcher 转向跨平台（macOS+Windows）+ 跨 session 记忆（Memory）+ 跨应用语音的 ambient peripheral layer
GitHub Copilot agent 集成：Raycast 开始充当 AI agent 的控制台（分配任务 + 实时日志监控），peripheral 角色向 agent hub 扩展

competitors.name: Replit
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Replit AI agent multi-agent workspace new features 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Agent 4 (March 2026): pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster. Parallel agents: multiple agents tackle different parts simultaneously (auth, DB, backend, frontend), progress fully visible. Large tasks auto-broken into smaller forks, run concurrently using sub-agents, results merged with conflict-resolving sub-agents. Multi-user: teammates submit requests simultaneously while agent intelligently sequences and executes in optimal order. Teammates work in own chat threads or collaborate in shared session alongside agent. Every request → discrete background tasks with status tracking, approval before merge into main project. Kanban for multi-user vibe coding. Design canvas for free-form exploration with 'Generate variants'.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。Agent 4 (March 2026): pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster. Parallel agents: multiple agents tackle different parts simultane

changes.description: Agent 4：多用户可在各自 chat thread 或共同 session 中与 agent 协作，任务后台并行执行
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent. Every request is broken into discrete tasks that run in the background; team members can track status, review results, and approve changes before they merge into the main project」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多人+多 AI agent 在共同 session 空间协作，任务后台执行+状态追踪——在软件开发垂直场景实现了 meee2 的 session 同构模型

key_findings: Agent 4：并行多 agent 执行（auth/DB/frontend 同步推进）+ 多用户共享 session，在代码开发场景实现了 session 同构协作
每个请求自动拆解为后台任务 + 用户审批流程，形成完整的 human-in-the-loop agent workflow

competitors.name: Superwhisper
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Superwhisper app new features AI integration 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only): Claude Code + Open Code agent integration—pipes voice transcripts into terminal agent, users control AI coding agents through voice dictation without keyboard. Remote cloud model support: Gemini, Grok added. UI redesign: new history, full text search, segmented playback, fast load, multi-select delete, upgraded model library. ElevenLabs Scribe added as cloud transcription provider. Per-mode keyboard shortcuts. Local models: Whisper Tiny through Large V3 Turbo, Parakeet V2/V3 on Apple Silicon. iOS support.
competitors.content_hash: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文。v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only): Claude Code + Open Code agent integration—pipes voice transcripts into terminal agent, users control AI coding agents thr

changes.description: v2.13.0：语音直接驱动 Claude Code/Open Code terminal agent，实现无键盘 AI 编码 agent 控制
changes.evidence: 「The integration pipes transcripts into the terminal agent, allowing users to control AI coding agents through voice dictation without using the keyboard」

key_findings: v2.13.0 添加 Claude Code 语音控制集成，Superwhisper 成为 terminal AI agent 的声音输入层

alerts.headline: Cursor 3：Background Agents + /multitask 异步子 agent 并行化，构建完整多 session 协调原语
alerts.evidence: 「/multitask is now available in the editor for running async subagents to parallelize your requests instead of adding them to the queue. Additionally, an Await tool lets agents wait for background shell commands and subagents to complete」
alerts.action_suggestion: 密切跟踪 Cursor 3 的 agent 协调协议是否向跨工具延伸（目前仅限 IDE 内）。若 Background Agents 开始跨越 editor 边界连接外部工具，将直接挑战 meee2 的跨工具 session 同构模型。建议 meee2 加速明确自己在「非编码工作」场景的 session 同构优势。

alerts.headline: Live Artifacts（April 2026）：artifact 实时连接数据源、不再是快照，直接实现 meee2 锚点 #2
alerts.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, staying connected to data sources for KPI monitoring and pipeline tracking」
alerts.action_suggestion: 这是 meee2 差异化锚点 #2 被直接竞品实现的最高警报。建议 meee2 团队：1) 立即重新评估 live link 的技术护城河（是否有 meee2 特有的实现），2) 考虑将 live link 与 session 同构（锚点 #1）组合推进——即 artifact 不只是「连接数据源」而是「人和 AI 共同 session 内的 live 实体」，找到 Claude.ai 实现的盲点。

alerts.headline: Copilot Workspace：人与 agent 在同一规划面上协同编辑 spec/plan/implementation
alerts.evidence: 「task-scoped — one workspace per issue or feature — pairs a spec, a plan, and an implementation in a single collaborative surface, where humans and the agent edit the same plan, the agent runs the implementation, and reviewers comment in line」
alerts.action_suggestion: Copilot Workspace 是目前竞品中最接近 meee2 session 同构模型的实现（人+agent 在同一协议面上操作）。关键差异：1) Copilot Workspace 仍是 issue-scoped，meee2 是 cross-context/cross-tool；2) Copilot Workspace 中人=reviewer，meee2 中人=full session participant。建议 meee2 在定位时明确这一差异。

alerts.headline: Linear Agent 公测（March 2026）：跨 Slack/Teams/Zendesk 的 ambient coordinator + CEO 宣告「Issue tracking is dead」
alerts.evidence: 「The Linear Agent works in the online, mobile, or desktop app, and as a plug-in for products including Slack, Teams, and Zendesk」
alerts.action_suggestion: Linear 从 issue tracker 向 ambient cross-tool coordinator 的跃迁是一个明确的定位信号，值得持续跟踪。当前 Linear Agent 仍以 issue/project 为中心，meee2 可强调「工作不只是 issue」——跨越 issue 边界的 session 上下文（F9 artifact pull）是 Linear 当前架构难以覆盖的空间。
